market_overview.headline: Markets showing broad bear structure with all major indices in Full Bear signal amid Iran geopolitical tensions.
market_overview.detail: SPY, QQQ, and BTC all in Full Bear with crossover alerts suggesting potential relief bounce ahead. 35% of top 300 stocks in Full Bear vs 42% in Full Bull, indicating mixed but defensive positioning.

momentum_themes.headline: Semiconductor & Optical Component Momentum
momentum_themes.detail: Electronic technology leads momentum with semiconductors and optical components showing explosive moves. Storage and networking equipment driving outperformance amid AI infrastructure demand.

sector_analysis.headline: Energy Leading, Tech Services Lagging

strongest.note: All energy stocks in full bull structure benefiting from Iran tensions
Industrial services showing defensive strength with high bull participation
Tech hardware mixed but semiconductor leaders driving momentum

weakest.note: Software sector showing broad weakness with 80% of names in bearish structure
Auto and consumer durables completely broken with no bullish names
Banking sector weak but some major names showing bear rally potential

sector_analysis.detail: Clear flight to defensive sectors with energy leading on geopolitical premium. Technology showing bifurcation — hardware/semis strong while software services remain weak.

items.text: All major indices in Full Bear structure despite crossover alerts — any bounce could be short-lived
Iran geopolitical tensions creating volatility — energy premium may not sustain if tensions ease
Technology services sector 80% bearish with major names like MSFT, META, ORCL deeply underwater
Consumer durables completely broken with TSLA, GM, F all showing significant technical damage

news_drivers.headline: What Moved Markets
news_drivers.summary: Iran geopolitical tensions dominated headlines with Trump threatening strikes and Iran halting LNG tankers through Strait of Hormuz. Markets showed defensive positioning with energy spiking while tech remained under pressure. JPMorgan's Dimon warned of inflationary impact from potential Iran conflict.

items.text: Trump's Tuesday deadline for Iran deal and threats of major strikes driving geopolitical risk premium
Iran halting Qatar LNG tankers through Strait of Hormuz escalating energy supply concerns
Service sector data showing cooling growth with inflation heating up amid war concerns
Wall Street clinging to gains despite heightened uncertainty as investors assess negotiation prospects
